reviews.comment:
Los sanitarios impecables, la atención muy buena. Tiene un parque amplio para estacionar y descansar. Siempre que puedo paso. Muchas gracias

(Translated by Google)
The restrooms are spotless, and the service is excellent. There's a large parking lot where you can park and rest. I stop by whenever I can. Thank you very much.

reviews.comment:
La gente que carga nafta es muy lenta, se ponen a cobrar en vez de dejar cargando los autos, poco sentido de lo que implica parar a cargar nafta en un viaje. Ni hablar del comedor full, no tienen comida lista (a las 13hs) y estuvimos 15 minutos sin que nos atiendan.

(Translated by Google)
The people filling up the gas station are very slow; they charge the gas instead of leaving the cars to fill up, giving little insight into what it means to stop to fill up on a trip. Not to mention the packed cafeteria; they don't have food ready (at 1 p.m.), and we weren't served for 15 minutes.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2w5UGVWTTJSbXhsVlRKbk4yOXJSMmhoVTJZNU0zYxAB
